problem_title: Compliance slows when FCA rules stay disconnected
problem_description: VASPs face operational friction from fragmented compliance tools that separate FCA-specific rules, provider outputs and case workflows. This fragmentation weakens audit readiness and makes it harder to maintain consistent, jurisdiction-tailored compliance across onboarding, review and reporting processes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates FCA-specific regulatory rules with provider outputs and case workflows to create a unified compliance operating layer that improves audit readiness, consistency and traceability for VASPs.
workflow_title: From regulatory updates to internal rules
workflow_description: SFTY monitors FCA regulatory changes and maps updates into internal rules to maintain compliance control and audit-ready evidence across VASP operations.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for FCA compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer for FCA-regulated VASPs, connecting KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, rules monitoring, case management and reporting into one consistent FCA-compliant workflow.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle FCA compliance cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures FCA case workflows by linking alerts, provider outputs, regulatory triggers, reviews, decisions, evidence and reports to support consistent compliance and audit readiness.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit evidence including decision logs, case history, provider data and regulatory updates to support thorough FCA review and operational transparency.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing FCA compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing FCA compliance tools, providers and data sources into a connected operating layer without requiring replacement of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace FCA compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows without replacing underlying FCA compliance vendors.
final_title: Structure FCA compliance operations with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY supports FCA rule monitoring, onboarding orchestration, case workflows and audit-ready compliance evidence.
